category_sources: source_facts.description says Fuzzy Finder in Rust; official GitHub README describes Skim as a fuzzy finder for files, lines, and commands.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to skim-rs/skim; official GitHub README and repository identify the project as Skim while the executable is sk.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, usage, key bindings, customization, and advanced topics.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/skim-rs/skim, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
